subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 19/25] server41tests: verify filehandle in ADD notification

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that the filehandle attribute is included in ADD notifications and matches the filehandle obtained via GETFH. The test creates a file from a second client, records its filehandle, and then requests a dir delegation with ADD_ENTRY notifications. It checks that the ADD notification includes a filehandle attribute that matches the one obtained via GETFH.
